MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE FINAL JUDGMENT
APPEARANCE: KATHRYN L ANDERSON, 901-0514 FOR PLTFS; MAUREEN A. HARRINGTON, 283-1776 FOR DEFTS OSWALD
RULING: MATTER ARGUED. Court finds plaintiff to be prevailing party pursuant to CCP1032(a)(e) but retains discretion to award such cost as the court determines to be equitable. The claims of all other parties including Edward Dean, Kevin Lee, Eugene Snow, Laura Corning and Edward Corning, Kirk Lumpkin and Denis Mackler in their individual capacities are dismissed with prejudice. Further, the claim of public easement which was not pursued by plaintiff in their amended complaint is dismissed with prejudies. All parties are to sign the maintenance agreement within seven days. STATEMENT OF DECISION AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (503)
